title: Gate 1 baseline — UNPRUNED v4 judge (+MTP) on the shipped GGUF/llama.cpp stack (LOCKED DECISION 6 addendum)
floor_frozen_note: Frozen BEFORE any unpruned rung has been MEASURED. Unlike the pruned ladder, the Q8/Q6/Q5 files already exist on disk (batch-quantized before this eval) — pre-registration here is at the measurement level, not the byte level. Stated honestly rather than claimed otherwise. judge_rho below is the only floor the unpruned rung deltas gate against; not to be adjusted after seeing a rung measurement.
stack: f16 GGUF WITH MTP head (block_count 41, nextn_predict_layers 1, expert_count 256), ~/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server, -ngl 999 --parallel 4 --jinja, CTX 20480

non_comparable_references.note: The PRUNED ladder's floor. Same protocol, DIFFERENT checkpoint — each ladder gates only against its own floor. Cross-ladder rho differences are within the established noise (noise_floor_finding, pkg4_quantization_ladder.json).
